---
title: "ESMV UE8 Aufgabe"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-11"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

#Laden der Bibliotheken
library(rstudioapi)
library(tidyverse)

Sys.unsetenv("VIRTUAL_ENV")
library(reticulate)
py_require("music21")
py_require("setuptools")
py_require("typing-extensions")

setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))  
```




```{python}
# Importieren aller Module
from music21 import *


### Aufgabe zu Übung 8 - Aufgabe 1 ###

# Das Stück laden
piece = corpus.parse('beethoven/opus18no1/movement1.mxl')

# Alle Noten sammeln
piece_flat_notes = piece.recurse().notes


# Zähler
count_violin1 = 0
count_viola = 0


# Mit getContext()
for n in piece_flat_notes:

    # Bestimmt den Takt der Note
    measure = n.getContextByClass(stream.Measure)

    # Bestimmt die Stimme / den Part der Note
    part = n.getContextByClass(stream.Part)

    if measure is not None and part is not None:

        # Nur Takt 51
        if measure.measureNumber == 51:

            # Violine I zählen
            if part.partName == "Violin I":
                count_violin1 += 1

            # Viola zählen
            elif part.partName == "Viola":
                count_viola += 1


print("Violine I:", count_violin1)
print("Viola:", count_viola)


# Kontrolle ohne getContext()

for i, p in enumerate(piece.parts):
    print(i, p.partName)


violin1_notes = piece.parts[0].measure(51).recurse().notes
viola_notes = piece.parts[2].measure(51).recurse().notes

print("Kontrolle Violine I:", len(violin1_notes))
print("Kontrolle Viola:", len(viola_notes))
```






```{python}
from music21 import corpus

### Aufgabe zu Übung 8  Aufgabe 2 ###

def your_search_function(x):
   return "Mozart" in x
#composer
search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)

```




```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
   return "mozart" in x

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)


```




```{python}
from music21 import corpus

# genau wie text

def your_search_function(x):
   return "MOZART" in x

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)


```


```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):

# funktioniert nicht weil erste buchstabe muss klein Sein
    return "Mozart" in x.lower() 

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)
```





```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
  
#funktioniert und sucht nach alle namen mit Alle Art von buchstaben 

    return "mozart" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)
```






```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def piece_function(x):
  
  # mann kan 2 namen Schreiben 

    return "symphony" in x.lower() or "sinfonie" in x.lower()

#title
search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "title")

print(search)


```







```{python}
from music21 import corpus


def vals_search_function(x):


#manweist Aber nicht welche name gefunden hat

    return "vals" in x.lower() or "walzer" in x.lower()


search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "title")

print(search)


```





```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "gustav holst" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)

```
```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "haydn" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)

```





```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "bach" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)


```





```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "debussy" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)



```


```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "ravel" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)


```





```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "wagner" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)
```





```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "dvorak" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)
```





```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "guitar" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)
```




```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "korsakov" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)
```




```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "schönberg" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)
```




```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "stravinsky" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)
```


```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "tchaikovsky" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)
```



```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "schubert" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)

```


```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "adagio" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "title")

print(search)

```



```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "concerto" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)

```





```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "berio" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)
```


```{python}
from music21 import corpus

def your_search_function(x):
    return "astor piazzolla" in x.lower()

search = corpus.search(your_search_function, "composer")

print(search)

```
